name: preview.md
description: A free and minimalist browser extension to read local Markdown files instantly. 100% Client-Side. Your Data Never Leaves Your Browser.

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome & npm run build:mozilla
scripts.build:chrome: vite build --mode chrome && tar -a -c -f dist_chrome.zip dist_chrome
scripts.build:mozilla: vite build --mode mozilla && tar -a -c -f dist_mozilla.zip dist_mozilla

author: noviirnawati.work@gmail.com
